command: import hashlib,json,sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0,"internal/audiobook_lab/scripts"); import sprint1_google_english_private_pipeline as p; run=Path("/tmp/earnalism-sprint1-autonomous-v2-private/alternates/the-monkeys-paw/the-monkeys-paw/full/5587b21dfa3da95c"); source=(run/"sanitized_source.txt").read_text(); chunks=p.full_generation_chunks(source); unit=chunks[-1]; expected=json.loads((run/"full_generation_manifest.json").read_text())["generated_audio"][-1]; assert unit["text_sha256"]==expected["text_sha256"] and unit["characters"]==expected["characters"]; provider=p.GoogleCloudTTSProvider(); audio=provider.synthesize(text=unit["text"],voice="en-GB-Chirp3-HD-Achird",language_code="en-GB",speaking_rate=0.84,pitch=0.0); out=run/"repairs"/"final_chunk_achird_0_84"; out.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True); audio_path=out/"chunk_0013.mp3"; audio_path.write_bytes(audio); evidence={"status":"PASS","slug":"the-monkeys-paw","unit_id":"chunk_0013","source_text_sha256":unit["text_sha256"],"characters":unit["characters"],"provider":"google","voice":"en-GB-Chirp3-HD-Achird","speaking_rate":0.84,"audio_path":str(audio_path),"audio_sha256":hashlib.sha256(audio).hexdigest(),"audio_size_bytes":len(audio),"estimated_usd":0.03018,"actual_provider_billing":"NOT_REPORTED","public_release_approved":False,"upload_performed":False}; (out/"repair_evidence.json").write_text(json.dumps(evidence,indent=2)+"\n"); print(json.dumps(evidence,indent=2))
